zh.lifeSummary: 當John Collins於1564年出生在英國素福爾可布拉福德時，他的父親John Collins II40歲，母親Abigail Rose20歲。他於1590年11月29日與Grace Wagger在英國素福爾可布拉福德結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1646年6月19日在他的家鄉享年82歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可布拉福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Collins于1564年出生在英国素福爾可布拉福德时，他的父亲John Collins II40岁，母亲Abigail Rose20岁。他于1590年11月29日与Grace Wagger在英国素福爾可布拉福德结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1646年6月19日在他的家乡享年82岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可布拉福德。

nameMeanings.name: Collins
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Colin , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

Irish and Manx: shortened Anglicized from Ó Coileáin, compare Cullen , or in Man or west Ulster shortened from Mac Coileáin, compare McQuillan and McCallion . The genitival -s is a local addition to Collin and variants after the surname was Anglicized.
Americanized form of French   Colin   or   Collin   and also   Collette  .

variants.name: Colin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Alfredo, Francisco, Jesus, Ricardo, Alberto, Angel, Arturo, Eduardo, Esteban, Faustino.  French Alexandre, Andre, Armand, Georges, Henri, Jean Claude, Jean-Michel, Laurette, Lucien, Marcel, Patrice, Pierre.
French, Walloon, and Breton: from a French shortened pet form of the personal name   Nicolas   (see   Nicholas  ). This surname is also found in the Flemish part of Belgium.
English: from the personal name Colin, a diminutive of Col, itself a pet form of Nicholas .

variants.name: Kolenc
meanings: nickname from the dialect plant name kolenc ‘yellow bedstraw (Galium verum)’ or ‘common nipplewort (Lapsana communis)’. Compare Collins 3.

variants.name: Collings
meanings: English: variant of Collins or Colling , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When John Collins was born in 1564, in Bramford, Suffolk, England, his father, John Collins II, was 40 and his mother, Abigail Rose, was 20. He married Grace Wagger on 29 November 1590, in Bramford, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 19 June 1646, in his hometown, at the age of 82, and was buried in Bramford, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Collins est né en 1564, à Bramford, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Collins II, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Abigail Rose, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Grace Wagger le 29 novembre 1590, à Bramford, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 19 juin 1646, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterré à Bramford, Suffolk, Angleterre.

November 1590 in Bramford, Suffolk, England Grace Wagger geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 19. it.lifeSummary: Quando John Collins è nato il nel 1564 nel Bramford, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, John Collins II, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Abigail Rose, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Grace Wagger il 29 novembre 1590, nel Bramford, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 19 giugno 1646, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 82 anni, e fu sepolto a Bramford, Suffolk, England.

ko.lifeSummary: John Collins(이)가 1564년 영국 수폴크 브램퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Collins II(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Abigail Rose(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1590년 11월 29일 영국 수폴크 브램퍼드에서 Grace Wagger(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1646년 6월 19일 그의 고향에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 브램퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Collins nasceu em 1564, em Bramford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Collins II, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Abigail Rose, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Grace Wagger em 29 de novembro de 1590, em Bramford, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 19 de junho de 1646, em sua cidade natal, com 82 anos, e foi sepultado em Bramford, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Collins родился в 1564 г. в местности брамфорд, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Collins II было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Abigail Rose, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Grace Wagger 29 ноября 1590 г. в местности брамфорд, суффолк, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 19 июня 1646 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 82 лет и был похоронен в местности брамфорд, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Collins nació en 1564, en Bramford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Collins II, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Abigail Rose, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Grace Wagger el 29 de noviembre de 1590, en Bramford, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 19 de junio de 1646, en su pueblo, a la edad de 82 años, y fue sepultado en Bramford, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
